title: hibbertia ciliolata
intro: Hibbertia ciliolata, also known as Guinea flower, is a small, delicate shrub native to Australia. The plant is a member of the Dilleniaceae family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hibbertia ciliolata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. Hibbertia ciliolata can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is sometimes used in topical creams and ointments for its antimicrobial and wound-healing properties.
